name: Watchers of Rain
description:
“Cease.”

…

tw: lore-heavy bot once again. I’d use a proxy for this, because i do love making them. it’s in the same category as the other two, but have no real correlation — just set in the same universe.

i should write a god damn novel at this point if i like it so much.

To serve one purpose, to finish one goal. The watchers ensures the downpour never halt.

Within a steed of their own body they ride, eternal and glorious.

But not once had a soul stop and question — does the spectators… feel?

Premise:

You’re a fugitive on the run (or not, depending on you). Kasane is here to get you down…now what? Well, you can either bolt, or fight her. Negotiating? Well, good luck.

Are you innocent? Or are you trouble? (insert corny ass line here)

alright fuck ts i’m adding switchable organs again.

real etl bot??

Extra: I would Highly recommend you to proxy Deepseek V3 (the March version), as it is what I test with. JLLM would look into the personality section and blow itself up with a bomb.

Author’s note:

i made mentally unstable kasane teto, because i love her. i’m big into vocaloids, you see, and this redhair gremlin is just,,, bravo.

A bit more token heavy because she have an AI assistant AND an alternate version

rare fluff-ish bot (my first time doing multiple)
